TypeSignature.Value: .class public auto ansi beforefieldinit ServicePoint extends System.Object

Docs.summary: Provides connection management for HTTP connections.

MemberSignature.Value: Public ReadOnly Property Address As Uri
public: property Uri ^ Address { Uri ^ get(); };

Docs.summary: Gets the Uniform Resource Identifier (URI) of the server that this object connects to.
Docs.value: An instance of the class that contains the URI of the Internet server that this object connects to.

remarks.format:
## Examples The following code example displays the value of this property.
:::code language="csharp" source="~/snippets/csharp/System.Net/HttpWebRequest/ServicePoint/servicepoint.cs" id="Snippet2"::: :::code language="vb" source="~/snippets/visualbasic/System.Net/HttpWebRequest/ServicePoint/servicepoint.vb" id="Snippet2":::

MemberSignature.Value: member this.BindIPEndPointDelegate : System.Net.BindIPEndPoint with get, set
public: property System::Net::BindIPEndPoint ^ BindIPEndPointDelegate { System::Net::BindIPEndPoint ^ get(); void set(System::Net::BindIPEndPoint ^ value); };

Docs.summary: Specifies the delegate to associate a local with a .
Docs.value: A delegate that forces a to use a particular local Internet Protocol (IP) address and port number. The default value is .

MemberSignature.Value: Public ReadOnly Property Certificate As X509Certificate

Docs.summary: Gets the certificate received for this object.
Docs.value: An instance of the class that contains the security certificate received for this object.

MemberSignature.Value: Public ReadOnly Property ClientCertificate As X509Certificate

Docs.summary: Gets the last client certificate sent to the server.
Docs.value: An object that contains the public values of the last client certificate sent to the server.

remarks.format:
## Remarks
> [!NOTE] > This property is only implemented on .NET Framework.
## Examples The following code example displays the value of this property.
:::code language="csharp" source="~/snippets/csharp/System.Net/HttpWebRequest/ServicePoint/servicepoint.cs" id="Snippet5"::: :::code language="vb" source="~/snippets/visualbasic/System.Net/HttpWebRequest/ServicePoint/servicepoint.vb" id="Snippet5":::

MemberSignature.Value: .method public hidebysig instance bool CloseConnectionGroup(string connectionGroupName) cil managed
Public Function CloseConnectionGroup (connectionGroupName As String) As Boolean

Docs.param: The name of the connection group that contains the connections to close and remove from this service point.
Docs.summary: Removes the specified connection group from this object.
Docs.returns: A value that indicates whether the connection group was closed.

MemberSignature.Value: member this.ConnectionLeaseTimeout : int with get, set
public: property int ConnectionLeaseTimeout { int get(); void set(int value); };

Docs.summary: Gets or sets the number of milliseconds after which an active connection is closed.
Docs.value: A that specifies the number of milliseconds that an active connection remains open. The default is -1, which allows an active connection to stay connected indefinitely. Set this property to 0 to force connections to close after servicing a request.
Docs.exception: The value specified for a set operation is a negative number less than -1.

MemberSignature.Value: member this.ConnectionLimit : int with get, set
public: property int ConnectionLimit { int get(); void set(int value); };

Docs.summary: Gets or sets the maximum number of connections allowed on this object.
Docs.value: The maximum number of connections allowed on this object.
Docs.exception: The connection limit is equal to or less than 0.

MemberSignature.Value: Public ReadOnly Property ConnectionName As String
public: property System::String ^ ConnectionName { System::String ^ get(); };

Docs.value: A that represents the connection name.

MemberSignature.Value: Public ReadOnly Property CurrentConnections As Integer
public: property int CurrentConnections { int get(); };

Docs.summary: Gets the number of open connections associated with this object.
Docs.value: The number of open connections associated with this object.

MemberSignature.Value: member this.Expect100Continue : bool with get, set
public: property bool Expect100Continue { bool get(); void set(bool value); };

Docs.summary: Gets or sets a value that determines whether 100-Continue behavior is used.
Docs.value: to expect 100-Continue responses for requests; otherwise, . The default value is .

MemberSignature.Value: Public ReadOnly Property IdleSince As DateTime
public: property DateTime IdleSince { DateTime get(); };

Docs.summary: Gets the date and time that the object was last connected to a host.
Docs.value: A object that contains the date and time at which the object was last connected.

MemberSignature.Value: member this.MaxIdleTime : int with get, set
public: property int MaxIdleTime { int get(); void set(int value); };

Docs.summary: Gets or sets the amount of time a connection associated with the object can remain idle before the connection is closed.
Docs.value: The length of time, in milliseconds, that a connection associated with the object can remain idle before it is closed and reused for another connection.
Docs.exception: is set to less than or greater than Int32.MaxValue.

MemberSignature.Value: Public Overridable ReadOnly Property ProtocolVersion As Version
public: virtual property Version ^ ProtocolVersion { Version ^ get(); };

Docs.summary: Gets the version of the HTTP protocol that the object uses.
Docs.value: A object that contains the HTTP protocol version that the object uses.

MemberSignature.Value: member this.ReceiveBufferSize : int with get, set
public: property int ReceiveBufferSize { int get(); void set(int value); };

Docs.summary: Gets or sets the size of the receiving buffer for the socket used by this .
Docs.value: A that contains the size, in bytes, of the receive buffer. The default is 8192.
Docs.exception: The value specified for a set operation is greater than Int32.MaxValue.

MemberSignature.Value: public void SetTcpKeepAlive (bool enabled, int keepAliveTime, int keepAliveInterval);
.method public hidebysig instance void SetTcpKeepAlive(bool enabled, int32 keepAliveTime, int32 keepAliveInterval) cil managed
Public Sub SetTcpKeepAlive (enabled As Boolean, keepAliveTime As Integer, keepAliveInterval As Integer)
member this.SetTcpKeepAlive : bool * int * int -> unit
public: void SetTcpKeepAlive(bool enabled, int keepAliveTime, int keepAliveInterval);

Docs.param:
If set to true, then the TCP keep-alive option on a TCP connection will be enabled using the specified and values.
If set to false, then the TCP keep-alive option is disabled and the remaining parameters are ignored.
The default value is false.

Specifies the timeout, in milliseconds, with no activity until the first keep-alive packet is sent.
The value must be greater than 0. If a value of less than or equal to zero is passed an is thrown.

Specifies the interval, in milliseconds, between when successive keep-alive packets are sent if no acknowledgement is received.
The value must be greater than 0. If a value of less than or equal to zero is passed an is thrown.
Docs.summary: Enables or disables the keep-alive option on a TCP connection.
Docs.exception: The value specified for or parameter is less than or equal to 0.

MemberSignature.Value: Public ReadOnly Property SupportsPipelining As Boolean
public: property bool SupportsPipelining { bool get(); };

Docs.summary: Indicates whether the object supports pipelined connections.
Docs.value: if the object supports pipelined connections; otherwise, .

MemberSignature.Value: member this.UseNagleAlgorithm : bool with get, set
public: property bool UseNagleAlgorithm { bool get(); void set(bool value); };

Docs.summary: Gets or sets a value that determines whether the Nagle algorithm is used on connections managed by this object.
Docs.value: to use the Nagle algorithm; otherwise, . The default value is .
